notes: Park ideas with revisit triggers — surfaced when a matching chapter/plan enters SELECTION. Dismiss when processed: python scripts/ppe_triggered_ideas.py dismiss <id> [--purge]

items.title: Revisit Uniblock vs single Web3 provider
items.summary: Deferred 2026-06-15. Not needed for Deribit/Polymarket/Yahoo or Cloudflare Access email accounts. Revisit when charter includes wallet connect or on-chain per-user reads.

items.title: Skim THREAD_INSIGHTS during SELECTION
items.summary: When burst or what's next runs SELECTION, agent should skim recent THREAD_INSIGHTS.md entries for the active chapter_id (not only TRIGGERED_IDEAS alerts).

items.title: Merge thread insight capture tooling (PR #737)
items.summary: Merge PR #737 so context_window_closeout --capture routes via ppe_thread_capture.py on main.
